notes: There is no movie playback, which breaks the intro, menu, and loading screens. The main menu causes a freeze for about 2 minutes, during the first load that session. There's minor stutters during gameplay. D9VK seems to solve these stutters, but causes the game to behave oddly in Fullscreen mode freezing the game during certain loads (Alt-Tabbing a few times seems to fix it). Performance is identical to Windows.
